channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Orlando Pirates clinch Premiership title after 14-year drought with decisive win over Orbit College
item.description: Orlando Pirates have finally ended a 14-year wait for the Premiership title after securing a 2-0 victory over Orbit College at Mbombela Stadium. The result, confirmed on the final day of the season, s...

item.title: Dispute grows over Katie Price’s claims about husband Lee Andrews as friends and family question his disappearance story
item.description: The article focuses on the ongoing controversy surrounding television personality Katie Price and her husband Lee Andrews, following claims that he had been kidnapped while in Dubai. According to repo...

item.title: Linux kernel vulnerability enables local privilege escalation via ptrace and pidfd_getfd flaw
item.description: Security researchers at Qualys Threat Research Unit have disclosed a serious vulnerability in the Linux kernel that allows local, unprivileged users to escalate privileges to root on affected systems....

item.title: US considers possible renewed military strikes amid ongoing tensions with Iran and fragile ceasefire
item.description: According to reporting from The Independent, tensions between the United States and Iran remain high as the Trump administration is reportedly preparing for the possibility of a new round of military ...

item.title: Nansledan development divides opinion over the future of Newquay’s high street
item.description: The article examines the growing debate surrounding Nansledan, a major development on the outskirts of Newquay in Cornwall backed by the Duchy of Cornwall and originally launched by King Charles in 20...

item.title: Well-wisher steps in to support young street vendor girl to return to school after emotional encounter
item.description: A heartwarming incident unfolded at an event hosted by Pastor Wilson Bugembe, where a young girl who was selling boiled eggs to make a living experienced a life-changing moment. According to reports, ...

item.title: ADC Picks Idris Durkwa as Consensus Candidate for Borno South Senate Seat in 2027
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don officially choose Idris Gatumbwa Mamman Durkwa as the party consensus candidate for Borno South Senatorial District ahead of the 2027 general election. Durkwa...

item.title: The Creation and Legacy of Queen Elizabeth II’s 1947 Wedding Cake
item.description: Queen Elizabeth II’s wedding cake, created for her marriage to Prince Philip on November 20, 1947, was an extraordinary symbol of post-war celebration and unity. Standing approximately 9 feet (2.7 met...

item.title: Aisha El-Rufai demands N2bn damages from ICPC over alleged defamatory statement
item.description: Aichatou El-Rufai, the wife of former Kaduna State Governor Nasir Ahmad El-Rufai, has taken legal steps against the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC), demandin...

item.title: Fire at PSU bank building on Madurai–Virudhunagar Road contained, documents damaged
item.description: A fire broke out on Saturday at the premises of a public sector bank situated on the Madurai–Virudhunagar Road in Tamil Nadu’s Virudhunagar district. The incident occurred on a fourth Saturday, which ...

item.title: Iran and the U.S. report limited diplomatic progress amid ongoing regional tensions
item.description: Iran and the United States have indicated that recent negotiations have shown limited but noticeable progress as tensions remain high following weeks of conflict in the Middle East. U.S. Secretary of ...

item.title: The Age Superquiz and Mini Crossword for Sunday, 24 May
item.description: This article from The Age serves primarily as a puzzle and entertainment page rather than a traditional news report. It introduces the Superquiz for Sunday, 24 May, along with a promotional section fo...

item.title: Former Kenyan Special Forces Officer Arrested in Nairobi for Possession of Ammunition and Military Equipment
item.description: Detectives from Kenya’s Directorate of Criminal Investigations (DCI) have arrested a former Kenya Defence Forces (KDF) special forces officer suspected of involvement in criminal activities in Nairobi...

item.title: Three youths charged with arson following alleged bridge fire in New Glasgow, Nova Scotia
item.description: Three youths are facing arson-related charges following an alleged incident in which a bridge was set on fire in New Glasgow, Nova Scotia. According to a report by CTV News Atlantic journalist Stephan...

item.title: Kitchener Rangers open Memorial Cup with dominant 5-0 win over Rockets
item.description: The Kitchener Rangers delivered a commanding performance in the opening game of the Memorial Cup, defeating the Rockets 5-0. From the outset, the Rangers controlled the pace of play, applying consiste...

item.title: NYT reporter says Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche is under pressure amid criticism over alignment with Trump
item.description: Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Blanche is facing heightened political and public scrutiny following a difficult week marked by congressional criticism and internal party tensions. According to rema...

item.title: Tinubu wins Kwara APC presidential primary with 310,990 votes, Osifo gets zero
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu has recorded a landslide victory in the All Progressives Congress (APC) presidential primary election held in Kwara State. According to the official results announced in Il...

item.title: Critique of Media Coverage and Climate Tipping Point Risks in a Warming World
item.description: The article argues that mainstream media is failing to adequately report the escalating climate crisis, allowing political and economic systems driven by corporate interests to continue largely unchal...

item.title: Kwara PDP adopts Kale Kawu as consensus governorship candidate for 2027 election
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) in Kwara State has officially settled for Engr. Kale Kawu as its consensus governorship candidate ahead of the 2027 general elections. The decision came after severa...

item.title: CPRG and AI4India release study on how artificial intelligence is reshaping future job opportunities in India
item.description: The Centre of Policy Research and Governance (CPRG) along with AI4India has released a detailed report titled 'Future of Jobs in the Age of AI: Emerging Roles, New Opportunities', focusing on how arti...
